Explanation:
Count the unique singles per album that charted (positions not “--”):
- 24/7: “summergirls” (50), “24/7” (42; also 12 on R&B), “i like it” (7; also 3 on Dance), “sunshine” (23), “never 2 much of u” (61) → 5 charting singles.
- swingin’: “romeo” (6), “gentle” (31) → 2 charting singles.
- the way i am: “ooh child” (27); “endlessly” (--) → 1 charting single.
Thus, 24/7 has the most top singles.
